title: Hướng dẫn tạo website học thuật cá nhân (Quarto → GitHub Pages)
text:
Hướng dẫn này dựng một website cá nhân (Home · Publications · Research · CV), miễn phí, tự render lại mỗi khi sửa nội dung. Người dùng chỉ cần biết gõ vài lệnh terminal — không cần biết lập trình web.
Thành phẩm mẫu: https://huantranubc.github.io/huan-research-site/



Trên máy Mac, mở Terminal và cài 3 công cụ:
# 1) Homebrew (trình quản lý cài đặt) — nếu chưa có
/bin/bash -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Homebrew/install/HEAD/install.sh)"

# 2) Quarto (công cụ dựng website từ file văn bản)
brew install --cask quarto

# 3) Git + GitHub CLI (đưa website lên mạng)
brew install git gh
Kiểm tra đã cài được:
quarto --version
git --version
gh --version




mkdir ~/ten-website && cd ~/ten-website
Toàn bộ file bên dưới đặt trực tiếp trong thư mục này.




Website gồm 4 trang viết bằng Markdown (.qmd) + 2 file cấu hình + 1 file CSS. Markdown rất dễ: **đậm**, *nghiêng*, # Tiêu đề, - gạch đầu dòng, [chữ hiển thị](đường-link).

⚠️ Mẹo quan trọng: trong Markdown, xuống dòng đơn sẽ bị dính thành 1 dòng. Muốn ngắt dòng thật (ví dụ khối địa chỉ liên hệ), thêm dấu \ ở cuối dòng.



project:
  type: website
  output-dir: _site

website:
  title: "Họ Tên"
  description: "Mô tả ngắn về bạn"
  navbar:
    left:
      - href: index.qmd
        text: Home
      - href: publications.qmd
        text: Publications
      - href: projects.qmd
        text: Research
      - href: cv.qmd
        text: CV
    right:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/USERNAME
      - icon: envelope
        href: "mailto:email@vidu.com"
  page-footer:
    left: "© 2026 Họ Tên"
    right: "Built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org)"

format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo        # đổi theme tại đây: flatly, litera, lux, journal...
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
    grid:
      body-width: 900px



---
title: "Họ Tên, MD, PhD"
about:
  template: trestles          # kiểu bố cục có ảnh bên trái
  image: assets/profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:email@vidu.com"
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/USERNAME
    - text: "ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0000-0000-0000
    - text: "Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=XXXX
---

Một đoạn giới thiệu ngắn về vị trí và hướng nghiên cứu.

- Chủ đề 2

### 2025

- **Họ Tên**, Đồng tác giả … (2025).
  *Tên bài báo.* Tên tạp chí.
  [DOI](https://doi.org/10.xxxx/xxxxx)

### 2024

- **Họ Tên**, … (2024). *Tên bài.* Tạp chí.
  [DOI](https://doi.org/...)

## Conference abstracts & proceedings

- **Họ Tên**, … (2024). *Tên abstract.* Hội nghị.

:::

Để tên mình in đậm. [DOI](...) sẽ tự thành nút bấm (nhờ CSS bên dưới).

title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

## Contact

**Họ Tên, MD, PhD**\
Chức danh, Đơn vị\
Địa chỉ\
[email@vidu.com](mailto:email@vidu.com)

## Education

- **PhD** — Trường, Quốc gia
- **MD** — Trường, Quốc gia

## Appointments

- **Chức danh**, Đơn vị, Năm

## Skills

- Kỹ năng 1
- Kỹ năng 2



Copy nguyên file styles.css trong repo này (font Newsreader + Source Sans, publication dạng thẻ bo góc, DOI thành nút badge). Đổi màu nhấn ở dòng --accent: #0d3b66;.



mkdir -p ~/ten-website/assets
cp ~/Downloads/anh-cua-ban.jpg ~/ten-website/assets/profile.jpg





cd ~/ten-website
quarto render          # dựng website vào thư mục _site/
quarto preview         # mở trình duyệt xem trực tiếp, tự cập nhật khi sửa file
Sửa file .qmd → lưu → trang tự load lại. Ưng ý thì sang bước đưa lên mạng.






gh auth login
Chọn lần lượt: GitHub.com → HTTPS → Yes → Login with a web browser. Màn hình hiện mã XXXX-XXXX → Enter để mở trình duyệt → dán mã → Authorize.



Tạo file này (GitHub sẽ tự render + đẩy web mỗi lần git push):
name: Publish website

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  build-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Check out repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up Quarto
        uses: quarto-dev/quarto-actions/setup@v2
      - name: Render and publish to gh-pages
        uses: quarto-dev/quarto-actions/publish@v2
        with:
          target: gh-pages
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}



printf "_site/\n.quarto/\n" > ~/ten-website/.gitignore



cd ~/ten-website
git init -b main
git add -A
git commit -m "Initial website"
gh repo create ten-website --public --source=. --push



Lần đầu nhánh gh-pages chưa tồn tại nên workflow báo lỗi. Tạo nhánh rỗng để mồi:
git checkout --orphan gh-pages
git rm -rf . >/dev/null 2>&1
echo "building..." > index.html
git add index.html
git commit -m "Init gh-pages"
git push -u origin gh-pages
git checkout main



gh api -X POST repos/USERNAME/ten-website/pages \
  -f source[branch]=gh-pages -f source[path]=/ 2>/dev/null || true
(Hoặc vào GitHub → repo → Settings → Pages → Source: gh-pages /(root) → Save.)



gh workflow run publish.yml
gh run watch    # theo dõi đến khi success
Sau ~1 phút website live tại:
https://USERNAME.github.io/ten-website/

📌 Quay lại _quarto.yml sửa site-url thành đúng địa chỉ này.






cd ~/ten-website
# ... sửa nội dung trong các file .qmd ...
git add -A && git commit -m "Cập nhật nội dung" && git push
GitHub tự render lại + đẩy web trong khoảng 1 phút. Xem lại nhớ Cmd + Shift + R để bỏ cache trình duyệt.




Nếu đã có ORCID, lấy toàn bộ DOI chính chủ:
curl -s -H "Accept: application/json" \
  "https://pub.orcid.org/v3.0/0000-0000-0000-0000/works" \
  | grep -o '10\.[0-9]\{4,\}/[^"]*' | sort -u
Bài nào ORCID thiếu thì tra thêm trên https://search.crossref.org theo tên bài.











Hiện tượng
Cách xử lý




Workflow fail lần đầu, log nói thiếu gh-pages
Làm bước 4.5 mồi nhánh rồi chạy lại


Sửa xong web vẫn nội dung cũ
Cache trình duyệt → Cmd+Shift+R hoặc cửa sổ ẩn danh


Khối địa chỉ/liên hệ dính thành 1 dòng
Thêm dấu \ ở cuối mỗi dòng cần ngắt


Ảnh không hiện
Kiểm tra file nằm đúng assets/profile.jpg và đường dẫn trong index.qmd


Đổi theme
Sửa theme: trong _quarto.yml (cosmo, flatly, litera, lux, journal, …)




Mọi chỗ ghi USERNAME / ten-website / Họ Tên / email@vidu.com thay bằng thông tin thật.

title: Huan Minh Tran, MD, PhD
text:
Postdoctoral Researcher, Division of Respiratory Medicine, Faculty of Medicine, University of British Columbia.
My research studies how air pollution, extreme temperature, and climate variability affect chronic respiratory disease — particularly COPD — from individual lung-function decline to country-level mortality. I work with clinical cohorts, administrative health data, and global ecological analyses.

title: Huan Minh Tran, MD, PhD
text:
Research interests

Air pollution, climate, and chronic respiratory disease
Extreme temperature and humidity effects on COPD
Eosinophilic COPD and susceptibility to particulate air pollution
Country-level analyses of climate-related respiratory mortality
Occupational and environmental exposure
Biostatistics in R and Quarto

title: Huan Minh Tran, MD, PhD
text:
Contact
Division of Respiratory Medicine, University of British Columbia
2635 Laurel Street, Vancouver, BC V5Z 1M9, Canada
huan.tran@ubc.ca · +1 236 996 8791

title: Publications
text:
Huan Minh Tran, Ting-Wu Chuang, Hanh Thi My Bui, … Feng-Jen Tsai (2025). Global impact of climate variability and air pollution on age-standardized stroke mortality rates from 2000 to 2020: a country-level analysis. Journal of Environmental Science and Health, Part A. DOI
Huan Minh Tran, Feng-Jen Tsai, Yuan-Hung Wang, … Hsiao-Chi Chuang (2025). Joint effects of temperature and humidity with PM2.5 on COPD. BMC Public Health. DOI
Huan Minh Tran, Feng-Jen Tsai, Kang-Yun Lee, … Hsiao-Chi Chuang (2025). Corrigendum to “Extreme temperature increases the risk of COPD morbimortality: a systematic review and meta-analysis”. Science of the Total Environment. DOI
Huan Minh Tran, Feng-Jen Tsai, Kang-Yun Lee, … Hsiao-Chi Chuang (2025). Response to letter to the editor re: Tran et al. 2024 (Huang et al.). Science of the Total Environment.





[Review] Huan Minh Tran, Feng-Jen Tsai, Kang-Yun Lee, … Hsiao-Chi Chuang (2024). Extreme temperature increases the risk of COPD morbimortality: a systematic review and meta-analysis. Science of the Total Environment. DOI
Huan Minh Tran, Ching-Huang Lai, Wei-Liang Chen, … Hsiao-Chi Chuang (2024). Effects of occupational exposure to metal fume PM2.5 on lung function and biomarkers among shipyard workers: a 3-year prospective cohort study. International Archives of Occupational and Environmental Health. DOI





Huan Minh Tran, Yuan-Chien Lin, Feng-Jen Tsai, … Hsiao-Chi Chuang (2023). Short-term mediating effects of PM2.5 on climate-associated COPD severity. Science of the Total Environment. DOI
[Review] Huan Minh Tran, Feng-Jen Tsai, Yueh-Lun Lee, … Hsiao-Chi Chuang (2023). The impact of air pollution on respiratory diseases in an era of climate change: a review of the current evidence. Science of the Total Environment. DOI
Huan Minh Tran, Ting-Wu Chuang, Hsiao-Chi Chuang, Feng-Jen Tsai (2023). Climate change and mortality rates of COPD and asthma: a global analysis from 2000 to 2018. Environmental Research. DOI
Tzu-Tao Chen, Kang-Yun Lee, Jer Hwa Chang, … Hsiao-Chi Chuang (2023). Prediction value of neutrophil and eosinophil count at risk of COPD exacerbation. Annals of Medicine. DOI
Amja Manullang, Chi-Li Chung, Yueh-Lun Lee, … Hsiao-Chi Chuang (2023). COPD with eosinophilic inflammation is susceptible to particulate air pollution exposure. Aerosol and Air Quality Research. DOI





Huan Minh Tran, Tzu-Tao Chen, Yueh-Hsun Lu, … Hsiao-Chi Chuang (2022). Climate-mediated air pollution associated with COPD severity. Science of the Total Environment. DOI
Huan Minh Tran, Hanh Thi My Bui, Somkiat Thoumsang, … Dung Tri Phung (2022). Health risk assessment of volatile organic compounds exposure among nail salon workers in Vietnam. Human and Ecological Risk Assessment. DOI





Huan Minh Tran, Hanh T. M. Bui, Somkiat Thoumsang, … Supat Wangwongwatana (2020). Occupational symptoms due to exposure to volatile organic compounds among female Vietnamese nail salon workers in Danang City. Journal of Occupational Health. DOI
Nhan Nguyen, Duong Le Dinh, Man Nguyen Dinh Minh, … Twisuk Punpeng (2020). Noise exposure and its relationship with hypertension among fishermen in Thua Thien Hue Province, Vietnam. Journal of Integrated Community Health. DOI






Huan Minh Tran, Hsiao-Chi Chuang, Amja Manullang, … Kian Fan Chung (2024). Increased risk of severity in COPD with eosinophilic inflammation due to air pollution exposure. ERS Congress 2024 Abstracts. DOI
Huan Minh Tran, Lin-Yuan Chien, Feng-Jen Tsai, Hsiao-Chi Chuang (2023). Effects of climate-mediated PM2.5 on lung function decline in chronic obstructive pulmonary disease. ISEE Conference Abstracts.

title: Publications
text:
Huan Minh Tran, Ting-Wu Chuang, Hanh Thi My Bui, … Feng-Jen Tsai (2025). Global impact of climate variability and air pollution on age-standardized stroke mortality rates from 2000 to 2020: a country-level analysis. Journal of Environmental Science and Health, Part A. DOI
Huan Minh Tran, Feng-Jen Tsai, Yuan-Hung Wang, … Hsiao-Chi Chuang (2025). Joint effects of temperature and humidity with PM2.5 on COPD. BMC Public Health. DOI
Huan Minh Tran, Feng-Jen Tsai, Kang-Yun Lee, … Hsiao-Chi Chuang (2025). Corrigendum to “Extreme temperature increases the risk of COPD morbimortality: a systematic review and meta-analysis”. Science of the Total Environment. DOI
Huan Minh Tran, Feng-Jen Tsai, Kang-Yun Lee, … Hsiao-Chi Chuang (2025). Response to letter to the editor re: Tran et al. 2024 (Huang et al.). Science of the Total Environment.

Research areas

Skills

Statistical computing: R, Quarto, reproducible pipelines, high-performance computing (Sockeye)
Methods: epidemiological study design, survival analysis, cohort & case-crossover designs

title: Research
text: Effects of extreme temperature, humidity, and climate variability on COPD severity, morbidity, and mortality — spanning individual lung-function decline, mediation analyses, and systematic reviews with meta-analysis.

title: Research
text: Effects of extreme temperature, humidity, and climate variability on COPD severity, morbidity, and mortality — spanning individual lung-function decline, mediation analyses, and systematic reviews with meta-analysis.

title: Research
text:
Air pollution & respiratory disease
PM2.5 and air pollution exposure in chronic respiratory disease, including the heightened susceptibility of eosinophilic COPD and the pathways linking climate and pollution to disease severity.

title: Research
text:
Global & country-level mortality analyses
Country-level ecological analyses of how climate variability and air pollution relate to respiratory and stroke mortality worldwide (2000–2020).

title: Research
text:
Occupational & environmental exposure
Metal fume PM2.5 and lung-function decline among shipyard workers; volatile organic compound exposure and respiratory symptoms among nail salon workers in Vietnam.

title: Research
text:
Current work at UBC
Environmental epidemiology using large Canadian cohorts — air pollution, wildfire smoke, and the Canadian Longitudinal Study on Aging (CLSA).
